name: Fiora

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Duelist's Dance
passive.description_source: Innate:  Fiora challenges nearby enemy champions, calling out a direction from which she will try to strike their Vitals. A new Vital is called out after some time or if one is struck.

effects.description: Innate: Fiora identifies the Vitals of nearby visible enemy champions, marked as an arc around them in North-, East-, South- or Westward direction. Vitals take 1.75 seconds to become targetable and linger for 13.25 seconds afterwards while Fiora remains near the target, otherwise the Vital will disappear. After a Vital ends, Fiora identifies a new one on her target.

Dealing damage in the direction of a Vital will trigger it to deal bonus true damage equal to 3% (+ 4% per 100 bonus AD) of target's maximum health, heal Fiora for 35 : 107.65 (based on level), and grant her 20% / 30% / 40% / 50% (based on Grand Challenge's Rank) bonus movement speed that decays over 1.85 seconds.

passive.description: Innate: Fiora identifies the Vitals of nearby visible enemy champions, marked as an arc around them in North-, East-, South- or Westward direction. Vitals take 1.75 seconds to become targetable and linger for 13.25 seconds afterwards while Fiora remains near the target, otherwise the Vital will disappear. After a Vital ends, Fiora identifies a new one on her target.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Vitals can be triggered by any source of damage Fiora deals, except those with default damage and reactive damage types.

basic_ability_1.name: Lunge
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Fiora  dashes in the target direction and then stabs a nearby enemy, dealing physical damage and applying  on-hit effects.

effects.description: Active: Fiora dashes in the target direction, then stabs a nearby enemy based on a priority. Lunge can hit structures and wards. Stabbing a target reduces Lunge's cooldown by 50%.

effects.context_notes: The stab deals physical damage and applies on-hit effects.

effects.description: Fiora can cast any of her abilities during the dash. The target does not have to be visible to be hit by this ability, unless it is a ward.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Fiora dashes in the target direction, then stabs a nearby enemy based on a priority. Lunge can hit structures and wards. Stabbing a target reduces Lunge's cooldown by 50%.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Lunge deals basic damage, but also triggers spell effects by also being tagged as spell damage.

basic_ability_2.name: Riposte
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Fiora briefly parries all incoming damage and  debuffs, then stabs in a direction, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

effects.description: Active: Fiora enters a defensive stance for 0.75 seconds, during which she is unable to act, prevents all incoming non- turret damage, and gains debuff immunity.
The enemy champion struck is also slowed and crippled by 25% for 2 seconds. If Riposte negates at least one hostile immobilizing effect, Fiora stuns the target for the same duration instead.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Fiora enters a defensive stance for 0.75 seconds, during which she is unable to act, prevents all incoming non- turret damage, and gains debuff immunity.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Riposte is not invulnerability but instead reduces any damage to her by 100% late into the damage event.

basic_ability_3.name: Bladework
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Fiora gains  bonus range and  bonus attack speed for the next two attacks.

effects.context_notes: Active: Fiora empowers her next two basic attacks on-attack within 4 seconds to gain 25 bonus range and bonus attack speed.
The first attack slows the target by 30% for 1 second but cannot critically strike.

effects.description: Bladework resets Fiora's basic attack timer.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Fiora empowers her next two basic attacks on-attack within 4 seconds to gain 25 bonus range and bonus attack speed.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Spell shield will only block the slow from the first hit.

ultimate.name: Grand Challenge
ultimate.description_source: Passive:  Duelist's Dance's  bonus movement speed is increased.

effects.context_notes: Passive: Duelist's Dance's bonus movement speed is increased.

effects.description: Active: Fiora challenges the target enemy champion for 8 seconds, highlighting all four of their Vitals after a 0.5-second delay. While in effect, Duelist's Dance does not identify new Vitals on Grand Challenge's target, and unlike Duelist's Dance, Grand Challenge's Vitals will linger regardless of range.
While near the target, Fiora gains Duelist's Dance's bonus movement speed.

effects.context_notes: If Fiora triggers at least one Vital before the target dies, or triggers all four otherwise, a Victory Zone is created on their death location for 5 seconds, which heals Fiora and all allies within the area every 0.

If Fiora triggers at least one Vital before the target dies, or triggers all four otherwise, a Victory Zone is created on their death location for 5 seconds, which heals Fiora and all allies within the area every 0.

If Fiora triggers at least one Vital before the target dies, or triggers all four otherwise, a Victory Zone is created on their death location for 5 seconds, which heals Fiora and all allies within the area every 0.

ultimate.description: Passive: Duelist's Dance's bonus movement speed is increased.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Grand Challenge is dispelled instantly if targeting a decoy.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
